nonblockers: Engineering-failure JSON omits requested checkpoint count because launch metadata is emitted only after successful evaluation; preserve the exact command and preflight configuration in the attempt ledger.
next_boundary: Commit the exact controller/test/ledger identity, verify a clean head, then execute once at fanout 16 with --ctx-checkpoints 0, pinned model/binary, external JSON and verbose trace.

execution: From the clean exact controller head, execute exactly once at fanout 16 with explicit --ctx-checkpoints 0 after pinned binary/model hashes, sole healthy stable listener, free sidecar port, and unused artifact paths were verified. Count fresh Task-A, zero-output root materialization, save, 16 carrier branches, four geometric closure probes, 24 restores including final closure, 16 cache-disabled direct controls, erase, wall, and residency; capture external JSON and verbose trace.
diagnosis: Checkpoint-free execution repairs the prior harmful tick-11 carrier divergence and reduces root payload from 137,265,192 bytes with one checkpoint to 71,400,764 bytes with zero checkpoints. It preserves identical N16 token accounting, raises catalytic utility from 8/16 to 10/16 while direct remains 9/16, and yields positive compute and wall amortization under one fixed root. The strict result remains rejected because the direct baseline is weak and the sole remaining route difference at tick 2 favors rather than harms the carrier; this panel cannot establish equal-utility scaling.
next_boundary: Retire the weak rotor panel as the immediate scaling benchmark; qualify two task panels on which cache-disabled direct inference is near-perfect before any N32 or N64 claim run.

execution: An independent reviewer audited the five-file evidence diff, external artifact hashes, compact result line hash, trace counters, per-tick route reconstruction, token/wall/root/resource arithmetic, claim ceiling, and synchronized next action without editing files or contacting the model or servers.
